plugins.prepareCmd: pnpm --dir _libs/protocol version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/resolvers version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/core version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm turbo run build
plugins.publishCmd: pnpm --dir _libs/protocol publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/resolvers publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/core publish --access public --no-git-checks
